outlook.summary: Spot 6636 trapped between immediate support at 6600 CONFLUENCE and Max Pain magnet at 6690. Massive negative gamma across all expiries amplifies volatility. Bearish smirk skew (1.57-1.79) indicates fear premium on puts, but all Max Pain levels above spot create upward magnetic pull. Critical inflection at 6600 - breach triggers acceleration toward 6400.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected. Positive total GEX across all expiries (0.94B combined) indicates dealers are long gamma, suppressing price movements. Market likely to consolidate near current levels with magnetic pull toward Max Pain.
outlook.summary: Market positioned at gamma flip equilibrium zone with spot (24470.5) just above critical 0DTE+Weekly confluence. Positive GEX creates stable conditions and suppresses volatility. 0DTE reverse_smirk (skew 0.62) indicates call premium and short-term bullish bias, while Monthly smirk suggests institutional hedging. Key magnetic attraction toward 24600 (0DTE Max Pain). Major structural resistance at 25000 (RESONANCE across all expiries + Monthly Max Pain with 3989 additional OI at 25075). Strong RESONANCE support at 24500. PCR elevated at 1.24-1.53 suggests bearish positioning but may fuel short-covering rally. Expect consolidation between 24500-24700 with directional move pending break of gamma flip zone.

levels.motivazione: Critical equilibrium where 0DTE (24424.48) and Weekly (24450.01) gamma flips converge within 0.1%. Spot at 24470.5 sits just above. Positive GEX means dealers suppress volatility here. Break below triggers dealer hedging sales; hold above supports stability.

RESONANCE across ALL 3 expiries. Monthly dominates with 751 PUT OI creating massive structural support. Combined with 0DTE (43 PUT) and Weekly (34 PUT). Only 0.12% below spot - immediate defense zone. Positive GEX ensures aggressive dealer protection.

0DTE Max Pain level - market maker target zone where option value minimizes. Only 0.53% from spot creates strong magnetic attraction into expiry. Natural price gravitational pull in positive GEX environment.

CONFLUENCE between 0DTE (61 CALL OI) and Monthly (343 CALL OI). Immediate resistance 0.94% above spot. Dealers short calls defend aggressively. Proximity to Max Pain creates friction zone limiting upside.

RESONANCE across ALL 3 expiries. Massive concentration: Monthly 989 CALL OI + adjacent 25075 strike with 3989 CALL OI. Also Monthly Max Pain. 2.17% from spot. 0DTE reverse_smirk confirms call demand. Breach required for extended rally.
